# Post PWA — Offline-First Point of Sales
> A modern, offline-first POS progressive web app for small businesses, built on the T3 Stack.

## Core Files
- [src/app/layout.tsx]: Root layout — providers, sidebar, theme
- [src/app/sw.ts]: Serwist service worker — asset caching & offline
- [src/server/api/root.ts]: tRPC router aggregation (product, category, transaction, store)
- [src/server/api/routers/]: tRPC procedure handlers
- [src/server/validations/]: Zod input schemas
- [src/lib/offline-db.ts]: IndexedDB wrapper for offline transactions
- [src/hooks/use-offline-sync.ts]: Background sync orchestrator
- [prisma/schema.prisma]: Database schema (Category, Product, Transaction, TransactionItem, StoreConfig)

## Features
- [src/features/cashier/]: POS cashier — cart, checkout, receipt, notes
- [src/features/product/]: Product & category CRUD management
- [src/features/report/]: Transaction report with filters, pagination, export
- [src/features/dashboard/]: Today's stats, revenue chart, top products
- [src/features/storeSettings/]: Store profile configuration

## Key Concepts
- **Offline-First**: Transactions save to IndexedDB, batch sync to Supabase on reconnect
- **Feature Modules**: Each feature is self-contained (components/hooks/pages/types/utils)
- **tRPC + Zod**: End-to-end type safety from DB to UI, no REST endpoints
- **Soft Delete**: Products marked `isAvailable=false`; Transactions set `deletedAt` timestamp — data preserved for reporting
- **WIB Timezone Storage Convention**: `Transaction.date` is `timestamp WITHOUT time zone`. The server pre-shifts UTC dates to WIB (+7h) before storing so Postgres `DATE(date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta')` always resolves the correct local calendar day. Chart queries use `TO_CHAR(..., 'YYYY-MM-DD')` string comparison to avoid node-postgres `Date` object UTC-shift pitfalls.
- **Real-time Dashboard Sync**: `useLiveStats` hook listens to both local `BroadcastChannel` (pos-sync-channel) and `supabase_realtime` Postgres changes. On `TRANSACTION_CREATED`, invalidates `getDashboardStats`, `getTransactionReport`, and `getRevenueChart` caches simultaneously.
- **Responsive Drawer/Dialog**: Vaul bottom sheets on mobile, standard dialogs on desktop

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 16 (App Router) + tRPC 11 + Prisma 7 + Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Tailwind CSS v4 + Shadcn UI + Radix UI + Vaul + Recharts
- Serwist (PWA/Service Worker) + IndexedDB + TanStack React Query 5
- Playwright (E2E testing)

## Documentation
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md]: System architecture, data flow, ADRs
- [docs/API.md]: Complete tRPC API reference
- [docs/DATABASE.md]: Schema docs with ER diagram
